title: 3GL Encryption Functions
text: 3GL Encryption Functions The encryption functions used by the security driver are delivered with the Uniface 3GL libraries. The definitions are provided in the C include file unienc.h (located in InstallDir /3gl/include/ ). Related Links Uniface and 3GL When you build a Uniface application, you might occasionally find that some tasks cannot be done optimally, or even not at all, in ProcScript. You might also find that the Uniface application needs to use legacy code that is available only in 3GL, or it might be required to embed Uniface components in a new or existing 3GL application.
